scripts:
set properties on /content/assignment/test/jcr:content
  set jcr:title{String} to "Test"
  set sling:resourceType{String} to "assignment/components/page"
end

set properties on /content/assignment/test/en/jcr:content
  set jcr:title{String} to "Test EN"
  set sling:resourceType{String} to "assignment/components/page"
end

set properties on /content/assignment/language-master/jcr:content
  set jcr:title{String} to "Language Master"
  set sling:resourceType{String} to "assignment/components/page"
end

set properties on /content/assignment/language-master/en/jcr:content
  set jcr:title{String} to "Language Master EN"
  set sling:resourceType{String} to "assignment/components/page"
end

set properties on /content/assignment/in/jcr:content
  set jcr:title{String} to "India"
  set sling:resourceType{String} to "assignment/components/page"
end

set properties on /content/assignment/in/en/jcr:content
  set jcr:title{String} to "India EN"
  set sling:resourceType{String} to "assignment/components/page"
end
create service user assignment-service-user with path /home/users/system/assignment
create user admin-user with password admin123

set properties on authorizable(admin-user)
  set profile/email{String} to "admin@assignment.com"
  set profile/givenName{String} to "Site"
  set profile/familyName{String} to "Admin"
end
create user content-author with password author123

set properties on authorizable(content-author)
  set profile/email{String} to "author@assignment.com"
  set profile/givenName{String} to "Content"
  set profile/familyName{String} to "Author"
end

set ACL for assignment-service-user
  allow jcr:read,jcr:modifyProperties,rep:write on /content/assignment
  allow jcr:read,jcr:modifyProperties,rep:write on /var/workflow
end

set ACL for admin-group
 allow jcr:read on /
 allow jcr:read on /libs
  allow jcr:read on /apps
 deny jcr:read on /content restriction(rep:glob,/*)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write,jcr:versionManagement,jcr:lockManagement,jcr:modifyProperties,crx:replicate on /content/assignment
  allow jcr:read,jcr:modifyProperties,rep:write on /var/workflow
end

set ACL for user-group
 allow jcr:read on /
  allow jcr:read on /libs
  allow jcr:read on /apps
 deny jcr:read on /content restriction(rep:glob,/*)
 allow jcr:read on /content/assignment
  allow jcr:read,jcr:modifyProperties,rep:write on /content/assignment/test/en
  allow jcr:read on /content/assignment/language-master
  allow jcr:read on /content/assignment/language-master/en
  allow jcr:read on /content/assignment/in
end
